title: Healing acne with diet: going animal-based with Shannen Michaela

chunks.title: Introduction and Context
chunks.summary: The podcast begins with an introduction to Shannon, a contortionist, and her journey from veganism to an animal-based diet. The host mentions her recovery from health issues related to her previous vegan lifestyle.
chunks.transcript: the more that we are separated from the way that we've lived as humans for hundreds of thousands of years the more problems we have in this podcast I had the pleasure of talking to my friend Shannon she's well known on social media as a contortionist she does all sorts of amazing things balancing on her hands including shooting an arrow into a moving Target of Joe Rogan's head and I actually just saw a video of her shooting a flaming arrow while on her hands with her feet she also has an interesting story regarding a recovery from veganism how she got into veganism what sort of things swayed her in that direction the health problems that she had with veganism that improved when she included meat and her diet she had resolution of acne many other things that some of you may be struggling with and she has a story regarding birth control how that affected her attraction to certain men versus not and so there are lots of interesting anecdotes from this story that I think you will all benefit from and she's a fun interesting woman to talk to she's currently eight or so months pregnant so it was awesome that she took the time in Costa Rica to talk to me in person I think any of you who know someone who is eating a vegan or vegetarian diet and struggling with health issues may find this beneficial that person will hopefully find it beneficial any of you out there who know someone or are taking hormonal birth control or struggling with skin issues can also find benefit perhaps from the anecdotes in this podcast with the resolution of Shannon's acne when she went to an animal-based diet and as I mentioned on previous podcast this is something I've heard multiple times in the last few months there was another woman at the farmers market here in Costa Rica that I met who also told me that her acne got significantly better when she cut out things like grains and beans pasteurized Dairy and is now eating meat and fruit raw dairy food changes are quite powerful for so many of the health issues we are told by Western medicine that are not able to be fixed so I hope this is an enjoyable

chunks.title: Community and Connection to Nature
chunks.summary: The final segment reflects on the importance of community, connections to nature, and how these elements factor into diet and lifestyle choices. The conversation emphasizes the need for intentional community-building and self-sufficiency.
